title: Curaleaf Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
text: Curaleaf reported fourth quarter and full year 2025 results showing domestic and international growth acceleration with gross margin expansion. The company's international division reported €172.5 million in revenue for full-year 2025, a 63% increase over 2024, and is now operating at an annualized rate exceeding €200 million. The international team closed out an impressive year with $51 million in fourth quarter revenue representing 10% sequential growth and 65% year-over-year revenue growth. Full year 2025 showed operating cash flow of $152 million and free cash flow of $89 million from continuing operations. For every $1 of reported earnings, Curaleaf generated significant operating cash flow, demonstrating solid cash generation abilities despite earnings volatility. The company's balance sheet strengthened with improved debt metrics and increased liquidity from operational cash generation and refinancing activities. Management expects continued momentum in 2026 driven by international expansion, domestic market stabilization, and potential federal regulatory tailwinds.
